definition: a group or set of twelve
I bought a dozen eggs.
18th in order
His birthday is on the eighteenth of July.
constituting number eight in a sequence; one of eight equal parts
He finished in eighth place in the race.
11th in order
She finished the race in eleventh place.
constituting number fifteen in a sequence; 15th
Today is the fifteenth of May.
fifth
This is the fifth time I've asked you.
The ordinal number corresponding to fifty.
Today is my fiftieth birthday.
coming after the thirteenth in order
Today is the fourteenth of July.
one of 100 equal parts; the ordinal number after ninety-ninth
This is the hundredth time I've told you!
19th in order
Today is the nineteenth of July.
constituting number 17 in a sequence
Today is the seventeenth of May.
the ordinal number corresponding to the number sixteen
Today is the sixteenth of December.
constituting number thirteen in a sequence
Today is the thirteenth of the month.
coming after the eleventh
Her birthday is on the twelfth of December.
20th
Today is the twentieth of May.
